Governance_Bodies

Parent item
33314415-10e1-8140-bdba-ddbb869636fc
long_description
Standing groups—boards, councils, alliances—hold memory, vision, and accountability between bursts of activity. They are where continuity lives when projects and grants come and go.
slug
Governance_Bodies
Activities

Description
Formal or informal groups responsible for guiding, stewarding, or coordinating collective action, holding shared vision, and maintaining accountability.
parent_pattern_name
Community Governance
